name: International
description: Cross-border instruments that are not issued as the domestic law of one jurisdiction.

name: Group of Seven
description: Intergovernmental policy context for G7 commitments and the Hiroshima AI Process.

name: United Nations
description: United Nations institutional and advisory context.

name: International Organization for Standardization and International Electrotechnical Commission
description: Joint international standards context for ISO/IEC information-technology standards.

name: Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers
description: International professional and standards-development context for IEEE publications and programs.

name: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development
description: Intergovernmental policy and legal-instrument context for the OECD and its adherents.

name: AI Safety Summit
description: Multilateral summit context for political declarations agreed by participating governments and organizations.

name: European Union
description: Supranational legal order of the European Union.

name: United States
description: Federal legal and policy context of the United States.

name: California
description: State-level legal and legislative context within the United States.

name: People's Republic of China
description: National legal and regulatory context of the People's Republic of China.

name: United Kingdom
description: Legal and policy context of the United Kingdom.

name: Japan
description: National legal and policy context of Japan.

name: Canada
description: Federal legal and policy context of Canada.

name: India
description: Union-level legal and regulatory context of India.

name: Singapore
description: National legal and policy context of Singapore, including statutory privacy law and government AI-assurance frameworks.

name: Republic of Korea
description: National legal and regulatory context of the Republic of Korea.

name: Australia
description: Federal legal and policy context of Australia.

name: Federative Republic of Brazil
description: Federal legal and legislative context of Brazil.

name: United Arab Emirates
description: Federal legal and policy context of the United Arab Emirates; free-zone regimes may create separate privacy-law layers.

name: Emirate of Dubai
description: Emirate-level digital policy and guidance context within the United Arab Emirates.

name: Kingdom of Saudi Arabia
description: National legal and policy context of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

name: Taiwan
description: Legal and regulatory context administered by the authorities in Taiwan; this research label does not express a position on sovereignty.

name: Hong Kong Special Administrative Region
description: Separate data-protection and AI-governance context of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region under the one country, two systems framework.

name: Republic of Indonesia
description: National legal and regulatory context of Indonesia.

name: Socialist Republic of Viet Nam
description: National legal and regulatory context of Viet Nam.

description: National legal and regulatory context of South Africa.

description: Federal legal and regulatory context of Nigeria.

description: Federal legal and regulatory context of Switzerland.

description: State-level legal and legislative context within the United States.
